content: Being a multi-millionaire 150 years ago would likely offer greater wealth and influence, but it would also come with fewer modern conveniences, healthcare, and societal freedoms. In contrast, being middle-class now provides access to advanced technology, healthcare, and a generally higher quality of life. Ultimately, it depends on individual values regarding wealth, lifestyle, and social conditions.
